physical_traits.fur_description: Extremely dense, fluffy long-haired fur; chocolate brown tabby patterns on the head and body with a brilliant white, curly ruff around the neck and chest
physical_traits.facial_features: Round face with a small pink nose and white paws

headgear.lighting: Brass-mounted adjustable headlamp with a glowing warm lens, secured by brown leather straps

outfit_and_accessories.clothing: Tactical olive-green canvas vest featuring multiple pockets, brass buttons, and specialized leather loops for locksmith tools

tools.right_paw: A large brass ring holding several antique skeleton keys
tools.left_paw: A single specialized lock-pick tool, with a leather tool pouch attached to the wrist
tools.vest_pockets: Visible magnifying glasses, tweezers, and various metallic picking instruments

outfit_and_accessories.footwear: Sturdy dark brown leather work boots with rounded toes

art_style.lighting: High-quality subsurface scattering on long fur and metallic brass textures
branding: iON Aventurile lui Ionică logo (bottom right)
